urdu transliteration text:
Laashe qaasim pe chillaye akbar
Akbar wailed at the body of Qasim
Chhod kar humko bhayya na jaawo
Brother don't leave us behind, all alone
Chhod kar humko bhayya na jaawo Brother don't leave us behind, all alone
english translation text: Sabr aayega furqatme kyunkar How will I have patience at your separation

urdu transliteration text:
Laashe qaasim pe chillaye akbar
Akbar wailed at the body of Qasim

Dekho khaimen me shore fughaan hai
Gham men har ek nauhaa kunaa hai
english translation text:
Hear the wailing moans from the tents
Everyone is lamenting in your grief

urdu transliteration text:

Akbar wailed at the body of Qasim

Tum nishaani ho ammu hassan ki
Ban gae aaj zeenat viran ki
english translation text:
You are the heir of uncle Hassan
Today you too have abandoned us

urdu transliteration text:

english translation text: He throws dirt on her face, in grief

urdu transliteration text:

english translation text: Be mindful of the master's old age

urdu transliteration text:

Every house will mourn your sorrow

english translation text:
O vazir (poet's name), it was scene of intense grief

Please recite a Surah Fateha
english translation text: for the Marhumeen of all who made this translation possible
